name: Get sessions
description: Get all active Jellyfin playback sessions. Returns session ID, user, device and what is currently playing.

name: Build request
Format response
Control playback
description: Control playback on a Jellyfin session. Commands: Pause, Unpause, Stop, NextTrack, PreviousTrack, Seek. For Seek, provide seek_ticks (1 second = 10000000 ticks).
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["session_id","command"],"properties":{"session_id":{"type":"string","description":"Session ID from jellyfin_get_sessions"},"command":{"type":"string","enum":["Pause","Unpause","Stop","NextTrack","PreviousTrack","Seek"],"description":"Playback command"},"seek_ticks":{"type":"number","description":"Position in ticks for Seek (1s = 10000000 ticks)"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
func:
msg.payload = JSON.stringify(msg.statusCode < 400 ? { success: true } : { success: false, error: `HTTP ${msg.statusCode}` });
return msg;

name: Search media
description: Search the Jellyfin media library. Returns item IDs, names and types. Item IDs can be used with jellyfin_play or jellyfin_get_poster. Get the poster and display it in the response if not explicitly asked not to. Results are limited by the limit parameter (default 10) — the total field shows how many items exist on the server. Use a higher limit to fetch more.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["query"],"properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Search term"},"media_type":{"type":"string","enum":["Movie","Series","Season","Episode","Audio","MusicAlbum","MusicArtist"],"description":"Filter by media type (optional)"},"limit":{"type":"number","description":"Max number of results, default 10"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Play media
description: Start playing a specific media item on a Jellyfin session. Use jellyfin_search to find item IDs and jellyfin_get_sessions to find session IDs.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["session_id","item_id"],"properties":{"session_id":{"type":"string","description":"Session ID from jellyfin_get_sessions"},"item_id":{"type":"string","description":"Item ID from jellyfin_search"},"start_ticks":{"type":"number","description":"Start position in ticks (optional, 1s = 10000000 ticks)"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
func:
msg.payload = JSON.stringify(msg.statusCode < 400 ? { success: true } : { success: false, error: `HTTP ${msg.statusCode}` });
return msg;

name: Get poster
description: Fetch the poster image for a Jellyfin media item. Returns the image so it can be displayed. Use item IDs from jellyfin_search.

name: Build request
Format response
